_note: PROBE: the @max/@min pick selector on affect — act on THE one best target. One attacker among 4 co-located fighters strikes ONLY the highest-prowess peer and cares ONLY for the weakest. Expect exactly ONE 'took the hit' and ONE 'got the care' in the chronicle; more = pick is broken (hit everyone), zero = pick hit nobody.

events.label: took the hit (should be ONLY the top-prowess fighter 4)
got the care (should be ONLY the frail fighter 2)
